sourceEvidence: Phase 3C.1 inspect report, branch claude/dqa-r1-baseline-verify-itidmp, HEAD fe6f87e

datasets.name: generated_signal_pairs
datasets.role: canonical full generated/resolved model audit source
notes: Source of truth for model audit and DQA.

datasets.name: generated_signal_research_snapshots
datasets.role: broad research candidate snapshot, mostly unresolved/pre-decision
notes: Not a direct ROI source without join/resolution against generated_signal_pairs.

datasets.name: track_record_display_signals
notes: Not a full model audit source; rows disappear on refresh.

datasets.name: track_record_shown_signal_history
notes: Needs join to a resolved source (generated_signal_pairs) for the actual win/loss result.

datasets.name: track_record_window_results
datasets.role: realized read-model/window result for trust-block/display windows
datasets.criticalRule: projected_return_usd/projected_pnl_units/projected_win_probability MUST NOT be used as realized results.
notes: Not a canonical full dataset despite having resolved-looking fields.

datasets.name: night_event_reservations
notes: Contur3 execution-contour table, not a modeling dataset.

datasets.name: event_execution_queue
datasets.role: per-event execution queue; Ireland reads only this table via the executor queue API
notes: Execution-contour table, not a modeling dataset.

datasets.name: executor_order_events
notes: GAP: CREATE TABLE not found in supabase/migrations during Phase 3C.1 inspect — schema source unconfirmed.

rules: The canonical full model-audit source is generated_signal_pairs.
track_record_* tables are display/read-model layers, not full dataset substitutes for generated_signal_pairs.
Execution-contour tables (night_event_reservations, event_execution_queue, executor_order_events) are not model audit sources.
DQA-R1/R2/R3 must run before backtest, before strategy comparison, and before live promotion.
projected_return_usd/projected_pnl_units/projected_win_probability MUST NOT be used as realized results anywhere downstream.
